summary: This document is a formal Declaration of Conformity stating that KeepMeCompany's AI Intake Service meets the DCB0129 standard for Clinical Risk Management. It lists supporting clinical safety documentation and includes signatures from the Clinical Safety Officer and CEO dated November 1st, 2024. This confirms the startup's regulatory compliance status within the UK health-tech sector.
